title: Branch
description: A branch label with kind and parent (plus optional authorial metadata), per design/substrate-sketch-04.md §Branch representation. The substrate records that organize the fabula into :canonical, :contested, :draft, and :counterfactual lines; kind and parent carry enough structure for fold-scope and enforcement rules (fold rules themselves live in substrate-sketch-04 §Fold scope across branches, not here).

label.description: Stable identifier for this branch (e.g., ':canonical', ':b-tajomaru', ':draft-alt-ending-3', ':cf-remove-E4'). Sketch-04 uses prefix conventions descriptively; this schema admits any non-empty string. See production-format-sketch-05 PFS5-B3 + §Open questions OQ1.

kind.description: Role the branch plays under substrate-sketch-04 B1. Each kind has distinct fold-scope and enforcement semantics; the record carries only the kind label — the rules live in substrate-sketch-04 §Fold scope across branches / §Enforcement per branch. PFS5-B4.

parent.description: Label of the branch this one diverged from, per substrate-sketch-04 §Branch representation. Conditional on kind: ':canonical' has none; ':contested' defaults to ':canonical' (Python __post_init__ normalizes); ':draft' and ':counterfactual' must name a parent (or source) explicitly. The conditional requirement is expressed in this schema's allOf / if-then-else clause. PFS5-B5.

metadata.description: Open dict for authorial notes, creation τ_a, disposition history (per substrate-sketch-04 §Branch representation — particularly relevant for drafts and counterfactuals). The substrate does not interpret contents; tooling-specific extension only. PFS5-B6.

allOf.description: Parent presence conditional on kind per substrate-sketch-04 §Branch representation + PFS5-B5: canonical forbids parent; the other three kinds require it.
